[Home](https://www.banners.com/home) 2. [Banner Stands](https://www.banners.com/banner-stands) 3. [Backdrop Banner Stand](https://www.banners.com/backdrop-banner-stand) 4. Backdrop Banner Stand with Banner # Backdrop Banner Stand with Banner The backdrop banner stand, also known as a backdrop stand or a backdrop display, is a portable and adjustable frame designed to hold and display large fabric or vinyl banners. It provides a sturdy structure to showcase banners in a vertical orientation, creating a visually appealing backdrop for various events, trade shows, conferences, photo shoots, or stage presentations. ![Backdrop Banner Stand with Banner](https://lag.azureedge.net/product-images/44cea5b6-6bdf-4c0c-b2f0-afefc633d32d.jpg) Material Choice: 9 oz stretch fabric Product: with Backdrop Slider Stand Hardware Quantity: (Min: 1, Max: 1000) Size (H x W): 8' x 8' 8' x 10' ![Loading product options](/includes/Images/loadingBar.gif) Loading product options... Unit Price for Both: ![Calculating...](/includes/images/loadingBar.gif) * [Create your Product](#cust) * [Product Overview](#13e17d0d-b0d2-493b-8edf-4e7362bd526e) * [Templates](#3c4bfc82-28ea-4d6e-bfe3-218d89bb7a7b) * [Set Up Instructions](#35a6615d-c17e-4acd-921f-4e38c5305968) * [Specsheet](#ab576a1d-d547-40ed-a6e0-5afda34e4a92) ## Pick a Template All Templates 1st Communion 4H Accounting Advent Advertising Amusement Parks Anniversary Auctions Automotive Stands Awareness Baby Shower Back to School Banks Baptism Bar and Bat Mitzvah Bed and Breakfasts Birthday Boat Show Stands Boy/Girl Scouts Bridal Expo Stands Business Stands Business Stands Campgrounds Camps Cancer Awareness Celebrate Recovery Celebration Stands Chiropractor Church Stands Church Youth Clubs College Columbus Day Sales Community Confirmations Corporate Events Counseling and Therapy Dentists Education Stands Events Fairs and Festivals Family Reunions FFA Financial First Communion Fitness Stands Flu Shots Food and Beverage Stands Fraternities Fundraising Garage Sale Going Away Graduation Groundbreaking Ceremony Health Care Holiday Stands Home and Garden Stands Homecoming Hospitals Hotels Insurance Job Fair Stands Job Fairs Lent Libraries Loans Memorial Day Sales Military Misc. Stands Museums Music Stands Non-Profit Now Open Parades Pentecost Political Stands POW MIA Praise President's Day Sales Real Estate Stands Recognition & Motivational Registration Resorts Restaurant Stands Retirement Sales Stands School Dances School Events Sororities Sponsorship Sports Stands Sportsman Stands Student Council Student Organizations Sunday School Taxes Trade Show Booths Trade Show Stands Travel and Tourism Verses Veteran's Day Sales Vision Wedding Wedding Stands Welcome Home Will You Marry Me Template Design Template Design Unit Price: ![Calculating...](/includes/images/loadingBar.gif) ![Upload a File](https://lag.azureedge.net/banners-site-layout/ico-04.png) Upload a File Upload a File Unit Price: ![Calculating...](/includes/images/loadingBar.gif) Professional Designer Let Us Design Unit Price: ![Calculating...](/includes/images/loadingBar.gif) _Click on a template to customize your product_ #### [Product Description](#product-descriptionCollapse) ## Description This large banner frame (Slider) is a great alternative to standard pop up backwall displays. The Slider frame can adjust from an 81" to 120" width & 41.5" to 96" height display. Pole pockets are sewn on top and bottom of the fabric print. The frame is constructed out of 1.5" telescopic poles that slide, allowing multiple graphic sizes to be used on the display. Frame Color: Blac
